prompt: Create a highly detailed fantasy cyberpunk cityscape at night titled Neon Dream City: a romantic canal city with Venetian architecture fused with futuristic glass towers, glowing magenta and cyan lights, and a luminous full moon in a deep blue starry sky. Use a square 1:1 canvas, cinematic wide-angle view from water level, with a grand arched stone bridge covered in dense pink flowering vines crossing the center of the image. Show exactly 4 visible boats: one gondola docked at the lower left by a warmly lit arched building entrance, one small gondola near the center under the bridge, one larger foreground gondola at the lower right carrying seated silhouettes with bright cyan underglow, and one dark moored boat at the far right edge. Include exactly 5 prominent glowing jellyfish holograms or aquarium-like displays: one tall jellyfish in a tower capsule on the left skyline, one jellyfish inside a pink dome near the center-left skyline, one floating jellyfish sign high in the middle distance, one large jellyfish display in the right-side arched window, and one small jellyfish display near the far right lower window. The city should contain ornate balconies, domed conservatories, spires, skyscrapers, streetlamps, tiny silhouetted pedestrians on the bridge, and pink blossoms cascading from both sides. The canal water must be calm but rippled, reflecting intense neon cyan, magenta, violet, and warm orange lights in long vertical streaks. Mood: dreamy, romantic, magical, futuristic, ultra-detailed digital painting, sharp architectural detail, volumetric moonlight, glowing mist, rich contrast, no text, no logo, no watermark.
